title: campanulaceae
intro: The Campanulaceae rank refers to the family of flowering plants, commonly known as the bellflower family. It is a large and diverse group of plants, consisting of over 2,000 species, including bellflowers, lobelias, and harebells. These plants are typically found in a wide range of habitats, from dry grasslands to wetlands and alpine meadows. The Campanulaceae family is characterized by its bell-shaped flowers, which often come in shades of blue, purple, and white.
